narrative:
Precinct Butler Twp South (precinct in Columbiana County) has 771 registered voters, with 48.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.6 percentage points.
